title: Pro Breeze® 10L Desiccant Dehumidifier with Timer, Air Filter, Continuous Drainage, Digital Control Panel - Ideal for Cold Temperatures in Damp Homes, Basements & Garages
features: 10 Litres Per Day: Extracts up to 10 litres of moisture per day in temperatures as low as 1°C. It is ideal for damp, mould and moisture in large homes, rooms, bathrooms, garages and basements.

Cold Temperatures: While regular compressor dehumidifiers work well between 20-30°C, they stop collecting moisture below 15°C, meaning they are unsuitable for colder environments. The Pro Breeze Desiccant Dehumidifier is designed to collect water in temperatures as low as 1°C and perfect for colder rooms or during the winter.
Large Collection Tank: Large 3L water tank automatically shuts off when maximum capacity is reached, and a continuous drainage hose is included for long-term use.

Set Desired Humidity: The built-in humidity sensor allows you to set your desired room humidity. Once this level is reached the unit will turn off to preserve energy. The swinging air outlet ensures you can direct air flow in any direction you desire.
Digital Control Panel: LED lights display current room humidity level and the easy-to-use control panel ensures simple control of dehumidifier power and auto-off timer.
